title: linaria vulgaris subsp. italica
intro: Linaria vulgaris subsp. italica, also known as Italian toadflax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linaria vulgaris subsp. italica include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, and aiding in the healing of wounds. Herbal preparations of Linaria vulgaris subsp. italica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
